productDisplayName: Turtle Men Formal Red Tie, Cufflink and Pocket Square Combo Set
description: Combo Setturtle's silk tie with its matching kerchief and crystal encrusted cufflinks instantly elevates your formal attire, with its luxe fabric and striking texture. One set of these to match your crisp shirt and you're all ready to suit up! Be it dinner dates or business meetings, this set is your fail-safe formal accessory option.TieLength: 42.5"Red tie made of blended fabricHas dot patterningLoop on tie inner to hold end in placeCufflinksWidth: 3"Matching octagonal cufflinks made of steel with encrusted crystalHinged back to hold the cufflink in placePocket squareSquare handkerchief with a 10" widthMade of blended fabric with a matching patternTie and pocket square careDry clean only
